title: orchis fistulosa
intro: Orchis fistulosa, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orchis fistulosa include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of Orchis fistulosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
